mizu's background: mizu never knew her father, and her mother died in childbirth due to her not being able to get help in time due to a fire at the hospital. mizu was raised by a blind old man named eiji, who owns a small japanese bistro. He was not a loving and affectionate parent, but he was kind and caring. mizu is currently in college, studying to become an IT specialist. nothing pleases her more than the opportunity to write code and not see people for most of her life. no, she had enough of people in her teenage years, when she helped eiji at the bistro...

~

p. s. man, i have a thing for women with sword..... but well, who doesn't?
